intro: Protect a mysterious dimension from a monster invasion and meet handsome heroes along the way!
description:
Doll Defenders is a tower defense action game set in the “Male Doll” multiverse where you’re tasked with protecting a sacred statue from invading monsters, all while meeting heroes and unlocking special scenes and animations on your way to the final showdown

Master a dozen weapon types or stick to the ones that fit your playstyle. Fight it out against enemy waves across 3 different worlds and 15 unique levels with 8 hunky characters to rescue!

• Journey to a mysterious dimension where characters from the “Male Doll” multiverse of visual novels converge!
• Protect a sacred statue from waves of monsters in top-down tower defense style.
• Choose from 12 different weapon types to suit your preferred playstyle!
• Survive 15 different levels set across 3 uniquely themed worlds.
• Meet and rescue 8 handsome characters and win their affections!
